children.heading: Prohibition on use of funds
children.label: b Prohibition on use of funds
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, effective beginning on , no county funds made available under this subchapter may be used by any participating county for any lobbying activity, regardless of the purpose for which the funds are obligated on or before that date.November 15, 2021
